input.signal_brief: $14M Series A in February and Python roles increased from 2 to 7 in 60 days.

candidate_output.subject: Request: 15 minutes on your Q3 Python hiring
candidate_output.body: Hi Maya, You closed your $14M Series A in February and your open Python roles moved from 2 to 7 in the last 60 days. We place managed Python and data engineers with at least three hours of timezone overlap. Would 15 minutes next week be useful to compare options? Best, Yabi

input.signal_brief: 12% contraction in March with continued data hiring.

candidate_output.subject: Context: cost-aware data capacity after restructure
candidate_output.body: Hi team, I saw the 12% contraction in March and continued data hiring. If delivery needs are still active, we can provide managed data engineering capacity with one-month minimum terms. Would a short scoping call help this week? Best, Yabi

input.signal_brief: New CTO announced on April 14 and vendor review expected in first 90 days.

candidate_output.subject: Context: vendor model brief for new CTO
candidate_output.body: Hi, welcome to the new CTO role announced on April 14. Many teams review vendor mix in the first 90 days, so I can share a one-page brief on common offshore models and trade-offs. Want me to send the brief? Best, Yabi
